# 7 Wings Immigration

> Senior-led immigration consultancy in Hyderabad. Visa & PR guidance for Germany, Australia, Canada, the UK and our JSS global-career program.

7 Wings Immigration helps professionals, students and families from India migrate through transparent, evidence-based pathways. Senior counsellors lead every case — eligibility scoring, document prep, embassy submission and post-landing support.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, success metrics and consultation booking.
- [About](/about): Mission, values and the senior-led team behind 1000+ visa successes.
- [Services](/services): All immigration services and country pathways.
- [Success Stories](/success-stories): Real client landings across Germany, Australia, Canada and the UK.
- [Book a Consultation](/book-consultation): Free 30-minute eligibility call with a senior counsellor.
- [Contact](/contact): Hi-Tech City, Madhapur, Hyderabad office details and enquiry form.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions on visa pathways, fees and timelines.

## Services

- [Germany Opportunity Card](/services/germany-opportunity-card): Chancenkarte points system, ZAB recognition and application.
- [Australia PR](/services/australia-pr): Subclass 189/190/491 skilled migration.
- [Canada PR](/services/canada-pr): Express Entry, PNP and family sponsorship.
- [JSS Program](/services/jss-program): Global job-search support and placement.

## Eligibility Calculators

- [Eligibility Hub](/eligibility): Free PR and visa points calculators.
- [Canada CRS Calculator](/eligibility/canada/crs-calculator): Express Entry CRS score.
- [Canada FSW](/eligibility/canada/federal-skilled-worker-program): Federal Skilled Worker eligibility.
- [Canada Saskatchewan SINP](/eligibility/canada/saskatchewan-sinp-calculator): SINP points.
- [Canada Quebec](/eligibility/canada/quebec-skilled-worker-program): QSWP eligibility.
- [Australia 189 Points](/eligibility/australia/189-points-calculator): Independent skilled visa.
- [Australia 190 Points](/eligibility/australia/190-points-calculator): State-nominated points.
- [Australia 491 Points](/eligibility/australia/491-points-calculator): Regional sponsored points.
- [Germany Opportunity Card](/eligibility/germany/opportunity-card-calculator): Chancenkarte points.
- [UK Skilled Worker](/eligibility/uk/skilled-worker-visa-calculator): Skilled Worker visa eligibility.
